channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Iran warns US ground troops would be ‘set on fire’ as regional diplomats meet on the war - AP News
item.description:
1. Iran warns US ground troops would be ‘set on fire’ as regional diplomats meet on the war  AP News

  4. Live updates: Iran ‘waiting’ for ground invasion, as US moves in more troops to Middle East  CNN
  5. Iran missile causes blaze in Beersheba-area chemical plant; Tehran official: US plotting ground op  The Times of Israel
